properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v3 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In every breath that I take In every move that I make Jesus I need you, I need you All of my days

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Nothing can separate us Nothing compares to your love Jesus I need you, I need you All of my life

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As high as the sky above how great is your love As deep as the ocean Lord your unfailing love You are my everything, my everything Jesus, I love you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Through valleys of shadows you're always by my side Jesus, Your promises that keep me alive You are my everything, my everything Jesus, I love you

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Nothing can separate us Nothing compares to your love Jesus I need you, Oh I need you All of my life

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: As high as the sky above how great is your love As deep as the ocean Lord your unfailing love You are my everything, Oh my everything Jesus, I love you

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Through valleys of shadows you're always by my side Jesus, Your promises that keep me alive You are my everything, Oh my everything

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Jesus how I love you Jesus how I love you Jesus how I love you Now and forever you are my father

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Jesus how I love you Jesus how I love you Jesus how I love you Now and forever you are my father How much I love you

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Through valleys of shadows you're always by my side Jesus, Your promises that keep me alive You are my everything, Oh my everything You are my everything, Oh my everything You are my everything, Oh my everything Jesus I love you Jesus I love you
